_ww-text_text.en: Bring me the messy idea, the half-built plan, the “I swear this makes sense in my head” project — I’ll help turn it into a website, app-style build, dashboard, or system that actually works.

_ww-text_text.en: Different people, different messes — websites, apps, systems, forms, all of it. The goal is usually the same: get it out of your head and into something that actually works.
